research_basis: OpenAI evals guidance frames evaluations as structured tests against specified criteria.
NIST AI RMF emphasizes validity, reliability, transparency, accountability, and risk management in AI evaluation.
LLM-as-judge frameworks distinguish reference-based groundedness/faithfulness and task completion/relevance checks.
rules: Required dimensions: groundedness, evidence_binding, scope_adherence, contradiction_handling, uncertainty_calibration, repair_routing.
Every claim must have evidence refs and scores for all required dimensions.
Blocking dimensions below threshold prevent PASS.
Repair-required packets must declare route to DEBUGGING, ECL, FIR_STAGE, MONITOR, or STOP_BLOCKED.
